name: Abstract Blog
description: Blog posts from the Abstract design version control and collaboration platform covering design process, DesignOps, team collaboration, and product updates.

posts.title: How to collaborate with non-designers using Abstract
posts.author: Alden Spence
posts.description: Feedback is key to making better products, when it is given in the right place, at the right time. Explores how Abstract enables design collaboration across teams including non-designers.

posts.title: A guide to modern retros: how to host valuable project post-mortems
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: GitHub's Kyle Diagle discusses how successful retrospectives depend on establishing trust among participants and building psychological safety.

posts.title: Disney Streaming Services' Ariem Anthony on people and process
posts.author: Kasey Fleisher Hickey
posts.description: Disney's senior design project manager emphasizes why process optimization and people-first thinking are central to DesignOps success.

posts.title: Introducing: Reporting in Abstract
posts.author: LaShaun Williams
posts.description: Announcing the Reporting feature in Abstract that surfaces activity data for identifying workflow bottlenecks and opportunities for improvement.

posts.title: How Zendesk planted the Garden design system
posts.author: Andrea Burton
posts.description: An overview of the organizational decisions and design system architecture behind Zendesk's Garden design system.

posts.title: How to lead a 100% remote design team
posts.author: Hannah Shadrick
posts.description: Remote design leadership requires good tools, good communication, good documentation, and plenty of empathy. Practical guidance for distributed teams.

posts.title: Approaching the product design process through an engineering lens
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Zipper's Duretti Hirpa explores the shared values between designers and engineers and how applying engineering thinking can improve the design process.

posts.title: Making the most of stakeholder review meetings
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Google's Meghan Schofield shares design communication techniques for getting the most out of stakeholder review sessions.

posts.title: Designers and product managers are better together
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Ellen Butters explains how strong PM-designer partnerships strengthen designers' influence on product roadmaps and business outcomes.

posts.title: Designing winning outcomes with Mia Blume
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Discussion on design's power to drive business results and the benefits of placing designers in executive and decision-making positions.

posts.title: Fonz Morris answers your user research FAQs
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Netflix's Lead Product Designer shares insights on how to uncover valuable design information and run effective user research programs.

posts.title: Design your team like you would your product
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: American Express VP of Product Design discusses how to approach scaling design teams strategically using the same iterative thinking applied to products.

posts.title: Netflix's Fonz Morris on the five golden rules of product iteration
posts.author: Alison Harshbarger
posts.description: Netflix's Fonz Morris emphasizes the importance of early-stage design refinement rather than waiting for end-of-cycle adjustments in product iteration.
